# Shreyas Bagal

> Pune-based social media manager and digital marketing professional with 3 years of experience. Has generated 1.1M+ verified reach for clients across healthcare, real estate, and personal branding.

Shreyas Bagal builds organic and paid growth systems for brands that need to be taken seriously online — clinics, real-estate firms, and founders. The work spans social media management, Meta Ads, content strategy, local SEO, and personal branding. Approach: study what moves the needle on each platform, then run those plays consistently until the data backs the brand.

Currently open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and long-term collaborations as a Social Media Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, or Brand Lead.

## Services

- Social Media Management: Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, YouTube — calendars, community engagement, brand voice
- Meta Ads & Lead Generation: audience research, 3-variant creative testing, CPL of Rs 20-25, CPC reductions of 20-35%
- Reels & Short-form Content: hook writing, CapCut editing, 200K+ views per top reel
- SEO & Local SEO: Google My Business optimisation, review strategy, keyword targeting
- AI & Workflow Automation: n8n automations, WhatsApp lead workflows, AI prompt systems
- Personal Branding: multi-platform founder branding, authority content, monthly insights reports

## Selected Results

- Painex Clinic (Healthcare, Pune): 742,806 verified Instagram views in 3 months, +334% profile activity, 367K accounts reached
- Headache & Migraine Clinic: 213,580 views, 98.9% from non-followers, multilingual hook strategy
- Kirti Associates LLP (Personal Branding): 155K+ combined monthly reach across 4 platforms, +155.9% LinkedIn members reached
- Silver Horse Ventures: local search ranking from #59 to top 5 in 2 months, #1 Reddit post in 24 hours

## Background

- BE Computer Engineering, TSSM's BSCOER, Pune (2021-2025), CGPA 8.98/10, 4th Rank
- Certifications: HubSpot Digital Marketing, Google Fundamentals of Digital Marketing, ECOMMEET E-Commerce
- Languages: English, Hindi, Marathi
